title: MoneyBills
description:
MoneyBills adds physical dollar bill items for simple item based currency in Minecraft
Textures are based on the original Minecraft Money mod Full credit to the original creator assets will be removed or handed over if requested
body:
💵 MoneyBills

MoneyBills adds physical dollar bill items to Minecraft for use as simple, item-based currency.

to get the money you need to type

/give @s money

and then select wich one you want

Available bills:

5$ Bill

10$ Bill

50$ Bill

100$ Bill

500$ Bill

These are regular Minecraft items, making them perfect for trading, roleplay servers, shop systems, or custom economies — without using scoreboard commands or complicated plugins.

Lightweight. Vanilla-style. Multiplayer friendly.

⚠ Texture Credit Notice

The bill textures used in this mod are not created by me.
They were taken from the original Minecraft Money mod, which is no longer being updated.

If the original creator wishes to continue updating their mod or wants these textures removed or handed back, I am completely willing to cooperate and transfer everything.

This project exists simply to keep the idea alive for newer Minecraft versions.
Available bills
